mapper.sql: CASE WHEN el.level IN (3) THEN "HIGH" WHEN el.level IN (1) THEN "LOW" ELSE "MED" END
mapper.select:
SELECT el.level, AS title, COUNT(DISTINCT( CASE WHEN sub.id IS NOT NULL THEN a.id END )) AS value FROM error_level el LEFT JOIN error e ON e.id_error_level = el.id AND e.status = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 LEFT JOIN alert a ON e.id = a.id_error AND a.status = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.resolved = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT d.id, tz.value FROM device d JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone tz ON tz.id = s.id_time_zone
JOIN site_employee_map se ON se.id_site = s.id AND se.id_employee = #{userId} AND se.is_hiding = 0
WHERE d.status = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0
AND s.status = 1 AND s.enable_alert = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0
AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', tz.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL) ) sub ON sub.id = a.id_device GROUP BY el.level

SELECT COUNT(a.id) FROM `alert` a STRAIGHT_JOIN error e ON e.id = a.id_error JOIN error_level el ON el.id = e.id_error_level JOIN device d ON d.id = a.id_device JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site JOIN time_zone tz ON tz.id = s.id_time_zone
JOIN site_employee_map se ON se.id_site = s.id AND se.id_employee = #{userId} AND se.is_hiding = 0
WHERE a.status = 1 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.resolved = 0 AND e.`status` = 1 AND e.is_delete = 0 AND d.`status` = 1 AND d.is_delete = 0 AND s.`status` = 1 AND s.enable_alert = 1 AND s.is_delete = 0 AND (CONVERT_TZ(UTC_TIMESTAMP(), 'UTC', tz.value) < s.expiration OR s.expiration IS NULL)
AND el.level = #{priorityType}
